about.title: We're Building the Future of Work
about.subtitle: RentAI 24 is the world's first AI staffing agency. We believe every business deserves access to intelligent, tireless, and affordable team members.
about.storyP1: RentAI 24 was born from a simple observation: businesses of all sizes struggle with hiring, training, and retaining talent for roles that AI can handle better, faster, and more affordably.
about.storyP2: Just like traditional staffing agencies place qualified human workers at companies, we place pre-trained AI agents. Our mission is to make AI workforce accessible to every business — from solo founders running a side project to enterprises managing thousands of customers.
about.missionDesc: To democratize access to AI workforce, enabling businesses of all sizes to operate more efficiently, serve customers better, and scale without traditional hiring constraints.
about.visionDesc: A world where every business has an AI-augmented team, where humans and AI work together to achieve more than either could alone.

values.accessibleAIDesc: Enterprise-grade AI at startup-friendly prices. We believe every business, from solopreneurs to enterprises, deserves access to intelligent automation.
values.humanAIDesc: We augment teams, not replace them. Our AI workers handle the repetitive work so your human team can focus on what they do best.
values.alwaysImprovingDesc: Our agents learn and get better over time. Continuous optimization ensures your AI workforce delivers increasing value every month.
values.trustTransparencyDesc: Your data stays yours. Always. We're SOC 2 compliant, GDPR compliant, and fully transparent about how our AI works.

founder.name: Daniel Reeves
founder.bio: A serial entrepreneur with deep roots in AI infrastructure, Daniel founded RentAI 24 after seeing firsthand how small and mid-size businesses struggled to access the same AI capabilities as large enterprises. His mission: democratize the AI workforce and make intelligent automation available to every team, everywhere.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From signup to deployment in as little as 24 hours

step1.title: Free Consultation
step1.desc: Book a 15-min call. We analyze your workflow and identify which roles AI can fill.
step1.detail: Our team walks through your current processes, tools, and pain points to determine where AI workers can deliver the most impact.

step2.title: AI Worker Matching
step2.desc: We recommend the best AI agents based on your industry, tools, and goals.
step2.detail: From our catalog of 150+ specialized agents, we match you with workers that fit your exact needs, tech stack, and business objectives.

step3.title: Customization & Fine-Tuning
step3.desc: We tailor the agent to your brand voice, processes, and specific requirements.
step3.detail: Your AI worker learns your products, policies, and communication style. We fine-tune responses to match your brand perfectly.

step4.title: Integration
step4.desc: We connect to your existing stack: CRM, helpdesk, email, messaging, calendars, and more.
step4.detail: Our team handles the entire technical integration. We support 50+ tools including HubSpot, Zendesk, Slack, WhatsApp, and more.

step5.title: Testing & QA
step5.desc: 48-hour test period where we monitor performance and make adjustments.
step5.detail: We run comprehensive tests with real scenarios, monitor response quality, and fine-tune performance before going live.

step6.title: Go Live
step6.desc: Your AI worker starts handling real tasks. You monitor via your dashboard.
step6.detail: Once testing is complete, your AI worker goes live. You get full visibility into performance metrics and conversation logs.

step7.title: Continuous Improvement
step7.desc: We track performance, gather feedback, and optimize regularly.
step7.detail: Our team monitors your AI worker's performance weekly, implements improvements, and ensures it gets better over time.

advancedFeatures.title: Advanced Features
advancedFeatures.subtitle: Power-user techniques to maximize your AI workforce
advancedFeatures.multiAgentDesc: Chain multiple agents together for complex tasks. Rex finds leads, Ava follows up with support, and DataBot tracks the results.
advancedFeatures.customPromptsDesc: Fine-tune your agents' responses with custom system prompts, brand voice guidelines, and persona settings.
advancedFeatures.apiWebhookDesc: Connect your agents to any external service using our API. Trigger agent actions from webhooks and automate complex workflows.
advancedFeatures.benchmarksDesc: Set custom KPIs for each agent. Track response times, resolution rates, and customer satisfaction scores automatically.
advancedFeatures.templatesDesc: Create reusable conversation templates for common scenarios. Agents use them as starting points for consistent responses.
advancedFeatures.accessControlsDesc: Set boundaries on what agents can do. Configure approval workflows for sensitive actions like refunds or data access.

tipsTricks.title: Tips & Tricks
tipsTricks.subtitle: Pro tips to get better results from your AI agents

tips.detail: Instead of 'write an email', say 'write a professional follow-up email to a client who hasn't responded in 5 days about our Q3 proposal'.
Reference previous conversations or tasks. Your agents remember context, so saying 'like we discussed yesterday' helps them provide better responses.
Schedule agents to perform routine tasks daily or weekly. Rex can send follow-ups every Tuesday, DataBot can generate reports every Friday.
Use agents together for complex workflows. Have Rex find leads, then Cal schedule meetings, and Ava handle follow-up support.
Share your brand guidelines, product docs, and SOPs with agents. The more context they have, the better their output matches your needs.
Check agent outputs regularly and provide feedback. This helps the AI learn your preferences and improve over time.
